# Entertainment Pros

> Entertainment Pros is a licensed and insured audio-visual sales and installation company serving Clearwater, St. Petersburg, Palm Harbor, Dunedin and all of Pinellas County, Florida since 2006. We design and install home theaters, surround sound, TV mounting, landscape and architectural lighting, motorized shades, and smart home automation for homes and light commercial spaces. Florida low-voltage license ES12001376. Free onsite consultations — call 727-804-2277 or request a quote at https://www.entertainment-pros.com/your-project.

## Services

- [Audio-Video Planning & Installation](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/audio-video-planning-and-installation): Whole-project AV design and installation, from pre-wire through final calibration.
- [Home Theater Design & Installation](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/home-theater-design-and-installation): Dedicated theaters and media rooms with seating, acoustics, projection and immersive sound.
- [Surround Sound Systems](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/living-room-surround-sound): Living-room surround sound design, speaker placement and calibration.
- [Condo TV & Sound Solutions](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/condo-tv-and-sound-solutions): HOA-friendly AV solutions for condos and apartments with concrete walls and limited wiring paths.
- [TV Hanging & Mounting](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/hanging-tvs-mounting-services): Professional TV mounting with concealed wiring, including over-fireplace and articulating mounts.
- [Residential Installations](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/installations-residential): Whole-home AV, networking and control installations for new construction and retrofits.
- [Light Commercial AV](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/commercial-audio-video): Audio, video and sound masking for offices, restaurants, bars and retail spaces.
- [Equipment Sales](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/sales): Sales of AV, lighting and automation equipment from the brands we install.
- [Lighting Control](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/lighting-control): Lutron-authorized lighting control — scenes, dimming and automated schedules.
- [LED Accent Lighting](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/led-accent-lighting): Architectural LED accent and cove lighting, including color-changing tape lighting.
- [Exterior Illumination](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/exterior-illumination): Outdoor architectural and landscape illumination design and installation.
- [Landscape Lighting](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/exterior-lighting): Landscape, holiday and color-changing exterior lighting for homes and businesses.
- [Home Automation](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/home-automation): Smart home control for AV, lighting, shades, climate and security from one interface.
- [Automated Shades](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/automated-shades): Motorized and scheduled window shades integrated with lighting and AV control.

## Company

- [About Entertainment Pros](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/about-us): Company history, credentials, and owner Chip Tollefson's background as a Marine Corps F/A-18 avionics technician.
- [Portfolio](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/portfolio): Photo gallery of completed home theater, lighting and automation projects across Pinellas County.
- [Brands We Carry](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/brands): The manufacturers we are authorized to sell and install.
- [Contact](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/contact): Phone, address, hours and consultation request form.
- [Tell Us About Your Project](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/your-project): 60-second project questionnaire that routes to a callback within 24 hours.

## Tools & Resources

- [Blog](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/blog): Articles on home theater, TV mounting, surround sound, lighting and smart home topics.
- [TV Size Calculator](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/tv-size): Calculates ideal TV size for a room or ideal viewing distance for a screen.
- [Surround Sound Calculator](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/surround-sound-and-setup): Recommends a surround sound configuration and speaker placement for a room.
- [AV Budget Calculator](https://www.entertainment-pros.com/av-budget-calculator): Estimates a realistic budget range for an AV, lighting or automation project.
